hero.subtitle: Stop writing brittle test scripts. Describe what to test in plain language — ProbeAI handles the rest. From authoring to execution to failure analysis, fully automated.

pipeline.label: How It Works
pipeline.subtitle: Four simple steps. No Selenium. No Cypress scripts. No flaky locators. Just describe your test and let AI do the heavy lifting.

compile.label: Describe
compile.desc: Write tests in plain English or YAML

execute.label: Run
execute.desc: AI executes tests in real browsers

features.label: Features
features.subtitle: Reliable tests without the maintenance nightmare. Built for teams who ship fast.

cards.title: Write Tests in Plain Language
cards.desc: No code required. Describe test steps in natural language or simple YAML. Your entire team — QA, PM, even designers — can write tests.

cards.title: Figma to Tests in One Click
cards.desc: Import your Figma designs and auto-generate test scenarios. Every screen, every flow — tested before a single line of code ships.

cards.title: Smart Failure Analysis
cards.desc: When a test fails, ProbeAI tells you why — real bug, environment issue, or test drift — with screenshots and evidence. No more guessing.

cards.title: Self-Healing Tests
cards.desc: UI changed? ProbeAI adapts automatically. No more broken tests every sprint. Focus on shipping, not fixing selectors.

cards.title: Parallel Execution at Scale
cards.desc: Run hundreds of tests simultaneously. Full test suite in minutes, not hours. Scale without worrying about infrastructure.

cards.title: Fits Your Workflow
cards.desc: Plug into GitHub Actions, GitLab CI, Jenkins, or any CI/CD. Get Slack alerts, Jira tickets, and team dashboards out of the box.

architecture.label: Why ProbeAI
architecture.subtitle: Traditional test automation is broken. You spend more time fixing tests than finding bugs. ProbeAI changes that.

rules.text: Traditional QA: Writing and maintaining Selenium/Cypress scripts takes weeks. Every UI change breaks tests.
ProbeAI: Describe tests in plain language. AI handles selectors, waits, and retries. Tests self-heal when UI changes.
Traditional QA: When tests fail, your team spends hours debugging — is it a real bug or a flaky test?
ProbeAI: AI triages every failure automatically — real bug, config issue, or test drift — with screenshots and evidence.

howItWorks.label: Getting Started
howItWorks.subtitle: No complex setup. No lengthy onboarding. Start testing today.

steps.title: Connect your app
steps.text: Point ProbeAI to your staging or production URL. Add environment variables and test accounts if needed — or let AI discover them.

steps.title: Describe your tests
steps.text: Write what you want to test in plain language. No locators, no selectors, no code. ProbeAI understands your intent and handles the rest.
steps.code:
steps:
  - "Log in as admin"
  - "Create a new project"
  - "Invite team member"
  - "Verify invitation email sent"

steps.title: Run & scale automatically
steps.text: Execute tests on every push, on a schedule, or on-demand. Run your entire suite in parallel — hundreds of tests in minutes.

steps.title: Get actionable reports
steps.text: When tests fail, you get a clear verdict: real bug or false alarm. Screenshots, network logs, and suggested fixes — all in one place.

cta.subtitle: Join 500+ teams shipping faster with ProbeAI. Free plan available — no credit card required.
